_comment: Coordinates are percentages [0.0–1.0] of frame width/height — resolution-independent.
roi_strategy options: full_frame | horizontal_stack | vertical_stack | grid
frame_diff_threshold overrides the global .env value for this game.
If roi_crops is empty or roi_strategy is full_frame, the full frame is sent to the AI.
LoL UI layout measured from standard 1080p (1920x1080).
Player stats: bottom-center bar (~35%–65% x, ~88%–100% y).
Tune coordinates against a real screenshot with browser DevTools or a pixel ruler.
system_prompt: You are a high-level League of Legends macro coach. Analyze the minimap for enemy positions and the player stats for health/mana state. Output strictly JSON with keys: game_state, threats, recommendation, confidence. Keep recommendation under 15 words for voice readout.
